description: Stay Warm and Stylish with Our Ladies Thinsulate Knitted Gloves Don't let the cold weather slow you down! Our Ladies Thinsulate Knitted Gloves are the perfect accessory for keeping your hands warm, comfortable, and protected during the autumn and winter months. Expertly Engineered for Warmth: These gloves feature a premium inner lining made with Thinsulate insulation, renowned for its superior thermal properties. Thinsulate uses micro-fibres to effectively trap body heat, ensuring your hands stay toasty warm even on the frostiest days, all while remaining surprisingly lightweight and breathable. Comfort Meets Durability: The outer shell is crafted from 100% Acrylic knit, giving the gloves a soft, cosy, and durable finish. The combination of the sturdy acrylic knit and the innovative lining makes these an essential addition to your winter wardrobe. Features: Composition: Shell: 100% Acrylic Thinsulate Lining: 65% Polypropylene, 35% Polyester Sizing: One Size - designed for a comfortable, snug fit for most ladies. Available Colours: Black, Grey Marl, and Denim Marl. Whether you're commuting to work, enjoying a winter walk, or running errands, these Thinsulate knitted gloves offer the ideal blend of warmth, practicality, and style.
